title: TurboWarp SMP
description: Create-centered technology and automation modpack, adding tons of industrial and mechanical blocks, new frontiers, explosives, and weaponry
body:
# TurboWarp SMP Official Modpack **Create-centered technology and automation modpack**, adding tons of industrial and mechanical blocks, explosives, and weaponry, balanced to be vanilla-esque. Take to the skies and beyond with **Ad Astra**, or enjoy better agriculture with **Farmer's Delight** and its expansions. Top it all off with plenty of **quality-of-life improvements**, a wide range of new building blocks to test your creativity on, and new **mobs, structures, and dimensions** to venture to. *You can use this pack however you want outside the SMP, but it's a very tailored and selective experience.* **It is highly recommended you use your own performance mods as well. This modpack only contains strictly necessary mods.** You can always join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/Qw3839zExv) for more information regarding the SMP, but note that we usually don't accept people into the SMP who only joined TurboWarp for the SMP (There's also a 30-day wait time before you're even allowed to register). ## Additions
Create & Automation - Create - Create Crafts & Additions - Create Big Cannons - Create: Steam 'n' Rails - Create: The Factory Must Grow - Create: New Age - Create Nuclear - Create: Enchantable Machinery - Create: Liquid Fuel - Create: Connected - Create: Bells & Whistles - Create: Slice & Dice - Create: Curios Backtank - Create: Ender Transmission - Create: Trading Floor - Create: Radars - Create Railways Navigator - Create Ad Astra Recipes - Create: Addon Compatibility - Rechiseled: Create - Crushed Astra - Create: Enchantment Industry
Space & Dimensions - Ad Astra - Deeper and Darker
Farming & Food - Farmer's Delight - Farmer's Delight Compat - Chef's Delight – Farmer's Delight Villagers - My Nether's Delight - Ender's Delight - Ocean's Delight - Animal Feeding Trough
Building & Decoration - Another Furniture - Supplementaries - Rechiseled - Building But Better - Bedspreads - Vertical Slabs Compat - Diagonal Walls - Diagonal Fences - Diagonal Windows - Fusion (Connected Textures)
Redstone & Logistics - Pretty Pipes - Pretty Pipes: Fluids - Wireless Redstone - Redstone Pen - Additional Redstone
Exploration & World Content - Naturalist - Friends & Foes (Forge/NeoForge) - Nyf's Spiders - Enhanced Celestials
Combat & Challenges - Mutant Monsters - Lucky TNT Mod
Storage & Utility - Ender Storage - Trash Cans - Item Obliterator - Nether Chested - Staaaaaaaaaaaack (Stxck) - Polymorph - Elytra Slot - Corpse - Charm of Undying - Sophisticated Backpacks
Enchanting, Trims & Progression - Easy Magic - Easy Disenchanting - Tool Trims Mod - Elytra Trims - Copper Age Backport
Quality of Life & Misc - Boat Break Fix - Amendments - Discs
